# Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] Links to a GitHub issue or accepted spec.
- [ ] Keeps Xbox-private material out of the public repo.
- [ ] Updates docs/specs when behavior changes.
- [ ] Adds or updates tests/checks when practical.
- [ ] Records new assets in `assets/manifest/assets.csv`.
- [ ] Confirms asset licenses allow public redistribution.
- [ ] Keeps content appropriate for kids ages 8-12.
